title: Wire RunOutput into run.go and wrapup.go replacing direct output
description:
Replace all direct fmt.Printf/Fprintf calls in run.go and wrapup.go with RunOutput calls.

Changes to cmd/tk/cmd/run.go:
1. Construct RunOutput early in runRun() with terminal, board, cloud, runlog sinks as available.
2. Remove all eng.On* callback assignments — engine now uses RunOutput directly.
3. Replace setup prints (Agent, Worktree, Board URL) with output.AgentInfo(), output.BoardURL().
4. Replace the iteration header/footer prints with output methods.
5. Replace the run complete summary with output.RunComplete().
6. Pass RunOutput to wrapup.Runner.

Changes to internal/wrapup/wrapup.go:
1. Add Output *output.RunOutput field to Runner.
2. Replace fmt.Printf for step results with output.WrapupStepResult().
3. Replace merge status prints with output.MergeResult() / output.WorktreePreserved().
4. Replace warning prints with output.Warn().

After this change, run.go should have zero fmt.Printf calls related to run progress (only cobra command setup and error exits).

Files: cmd/tk/cmd/run.go, internal/wrapup/wrapup.go
Tests: end-to-end verify run.go constructs RunOutput correctly.
